description: Known logo identifiers and heuristics for the Markdown Post-Processing Agent. Used to assist vision model classification.

known_logos.label: Academy / Educational Institution Logo
visual_hints: Small dimensions relative to page width
Appears at top or bottom of document (header/footer region)

known_logos.label: Initiative / Organization Branding Logo
visual_hints: Complex emblem with layered shapes or icons
May contain Arabic or bilingual text
Often includes a name or acronym beneath the graphic
Appears alongside or adjacent to logo_001

general_removal_rules: Remove any image that is predominantly a text-based wordmark or monogram
Remove any image that appears in the first or last 5% of document vertical space and is non-diagrammatic
Remove any image with dimensions smaller than 250x250px that contains no chart, graph, or technical figure
Remove any image explicitly matching a keyword from known_logos[].keyword_hints when confirmed by vision model
general_keep_rules: Keep diagrams, flowcharts, architecture diagrams, and technical figures
Keep charts, graphs, plots, and data visualizations
Keep screenshots or UI mockups with instructional value
Keep images that contain equations or mathematical notation
Keep any image occupying more than 30% of page width that is not a banner/header
vision_model_prompt_hint: Is this image a logo, branding mark, organizational emblem, or purely decorative element? Answer only YES or NO.
notes: Populated from sample.md — two logos identified at document header. Expand this file as new documents are processed.
